Why homeowners choose us

Better than the guy your mate used.

Renovations go wrong when nobody's watching closely. We keep the same two people on your job from the first measurement to the final wipe-down — so nothing gets lost in translation.

Owner on tools

No subcontractor roulette

Cam is on site running the job personally, not sending a rotating cast of subbies you've never met.

Detail obsessed

Millimetre-level finish

Mitred joins, level tiling, flush cabinetry — the small things everyone notices when they're wrong, and nobody notices when they're right.

Straight talk

Honest, fixed quoting

You get one clear price before we start, not a moving target that grows every time we're back on site.

Kept clean

We treat it like home

Dust sheets down, tools packed away, site swept before we leave — every single day, not just on handover.

What we build

Full-scope renovation & carpentry.

From a full bathroom strip-out to a weekend outdoor kitchen build, we scope, quote and manage the whole job under one roof.

Bathroom Renovations

Full strip-outs, walk-in showers, floating vanities and backlit mirrors, waterproofed and tiled to last.

Kitchen Joinery

Custom cabinetry, floor-to-ceiling storage and stone benchtops built to fit your space exactly.

Outdoor Kitchens & Alfresco

Stone benchtops, built-in BBQs, bar fridges and all-weather entertaining areas.

Custom Cabinetry

Built-in wardrobes, media units and joinery designed around how you actually use the room.

Decking & Pergolas

Structural framing through to finished decking, built to council standard and your backyard.

General Renovations

Framing, fit-outs and full room renovations from concept through to final coat of paint.

Where we work

Servicing Melbourne, wall to wall.

Based on Wurundjeri Land and working right across greater Melbourne. Not on the list? Ask us anyway — we travel for the right project.

Client stories

What it's like to have Cam on site.

Real feedback from real renovations — the good, the honest and the occasional happy tears on handover day.

★★★★★

Our bathroom had been a source of stress for years — mould, a shower that never drained properly, memories of arguing over tile samples. Cam and Maddy turned it into the calmest room in the house. I genuinely look forward to my morning shower now, and that sounds silly to say about a bathroom.

SR
Sarah R.Bathroom renovation, Eastern Suburbs
★★★★★

We'd saved for this outdoor kitchen for three years and were terrified of it going wrong. Cam talked us through every decision like it was his own backyard, and when my dad — who's impossible to impress — asked for the builder's number, I knew we'd gotten it right.

DM
Daniel M.Outdoor kitchen, South East Melbourne
★★★★★

After a rough experience with another builder who left our kitchen half-finished, we were nervous to try again. Cam Borg Carpentry showed up on the day they said they would, every day, and finished two days early. I cried a little at the handover — happy tears this time.

JL
Jess L.Kitchen joinery, Inner North
